checks.name: Null Count
checks.sql_template: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {schema}.{dataset} WHERE {column} IS NULL
checks.description: Count of null values in column

checks.name: Uniqueness Check
checks.description: Count of duplicate values (0 = all unique)

checks.name: Composite Key Uniqueness
checks.description: Count of duplicate composite key values

checks.name: Freshness (seconds since latest)
checks.description: Seconds elapsed since the most recent record timestamp

checks.name: Referential Integrity Orphans
checks.sql_template: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {schema}.{dataset} t WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM {schema}.{parent_dataset} p WHERE p.{parent_key} = t.{fk_column})
checks.description: Count of orphaned foreign key records

checks.name: Column Exists in Schema
checks.sql_template: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SYS.TABLE_COLUMNS WHERE SCHEMA_NAME = '{schema}' AND TABLE_NAME = '{dataset}' AND COLUMN_NAME = '{column}'

checks.name: Column Count
checks.sql_template: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SYS.TABLE_COLUMNS WHERE SCHEMA_NAME = '{schema}' AND TABLE_NAME = '{dataset}'
checks.description: Total number of columns in the table

checks.name: Value in Allowed Set
checks.sql_template: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {schema}.{dataset} WHERE {column} NOT IN ({allowed_values})
checks.description: Count of rows with values outside the allowed set
